title: PC activation awareness — PowerShell route receipts (manual only)
law: Manual operator run records a local read-only receipt only.
No autonomous execution, no auto-merge, no deploy, no secrets, no PC-wide scanning, no NAS mutation, no real device scanning.
No background daemon and no always-running watcher.
Script does not run npm verify pipelines unless a future human-approved phase explicitly adds that.
turtle_mode_posture: Branches use prefix cursor/zsanctuary/; one domain per PR; verify gates and human review before merge; receipt is not execution permission.

future_symbolic_metaphors_docs_only.mango_tree: Fruitful project knowledge and growth receipts — future docs/registry metaphor only; no mystical execution claims.
future_symbolic_metaphors_docs_only.starzan_tree: Star-map / cosmic relation memory — future docs/registry metaphor only; charter separately before any runtime use.
